nodes.title: Welcome to The Signal
nodes.heroSubtitle: Conversations at the Frontier of Technology and Society

heroDescription.processed: Every week, hosts Mira Patel and Jordan Hayes sit down with the thinkers, builders, and leaders shaping our technological future. Deep conversations, no jargon, real insight.
heroDescription.summary: Every week, hosts Mira Patel and Jordan Hayes sit down with the thinkers, builders, and leaders shaping our technological future. Deep conversations, no jargon, real insight.

ctaDescription.processed: Get access to exclusive bonus episodes, ad-free listening, full transcripts, and early access to new episodes every week.
